element_details: Welcome to PATH, here is the guidance
Please specify the target scenario
Evidence from model systems about the molecular target of the proposed intervention
What evidence do you have from models that suggests the drug engages and has the desired effect on its molecular target (M0-M1)?
Does this evidence address the following threats to validity?
Magnitude of effect (The size of the effect being reported is quantified)
Units are provided for all reported measures of effect where appropriate
If appropriate, some measure of precision around the estimate of effect has been provided, e.g. p-value, 95% confidence interval, etc.
Identity of comparator mentioned
Does this evidence include the following measures to address risk of bias?
Randomized experimental design is mentioned
Masked experimental design is mentioned
Study in question was pre-registered
Evidence from model systems that the drug about the physiological effects of the drug
What evidence from models suggests that the drug, once it has engaged with the molecular target, will go on to produce the intended physiological effect?
